texto: What was it with women and pushing men’s buttons?I get that a woman wants to look attractive. News flash: you already do. We see it. But apparently to women, owning their own beauty isn’t enough. They arm all the weapons in their arsenal to gain the attention of every Y chromosome within a ten-mile radius. Why do they go to all the trouble? Validation.Meanwhile, biology dictates survival of the fittest; battles ensue, wars are fought, and somewhere amid all the carnage, a victor emerges to claim his female. All because said female just wanted to go out and feel pretty that night.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kat Bastion que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “What was it with women and pushing men’s buttons?I get that a woman wants to look attractive. New…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, men, nature, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: Sometimes our emotions rule us. How we handle the consequences . . . defines us.
explicacao: Citação de Kat Bastion sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes our emotions rule us. How we handle the consequences . . . defines us.” articula motivacao, inspiracional, self-discovery em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e self-discovery.

texto: We have to talk more. I need you to know what we need to talk about. In fact, don’t decide what is and isn’t important to share with me, it all is—from the mundane to the shocking. If something upsets you? Tell me. Make me a part of your life in such a deep way that I don’t feel separate from it. I don’t ever want to feel like you’re keeping things from me again, even if it’s unintentional.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kat Bastion: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “We have to talk more. I need you to know what we need to talk about. In fact, don’t decide what i…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, communication, about pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: We have to talk more. I need you to know what we need to talk about. In fact, don’t decide what is and isn’t important to share with me, it all is—from the mundane to the shocking. If something upsets you? Tell me. Make me a part of your life in such a deep way that I don’t feel separate from it. I don’t ever want to feel like you’re keeping things from me again, even if it’s unintentional.
